subject: [PATCH v2 06/14] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking would be silently dropped, leading to potential security vulnerabilities. The patch updates several kernel functions to maintain the RWP bit when rewriting PTEs on VM_UFFD_RWP VMA pages, ensuring that the marker is correctly propagated across different memory management scenarios.
